sections.paragraph:
Original: אדד

Transliteration: 'ădad

Phonetic: ad-ad'

BDB Definition:

Hadad = "I shall move softly: I shall love"
  1. an Edomite enemy God raised up to punish Solomon for his sins

Origin: probably an orthographical variation for H2301

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
